claims.found: 1072: 'Synthetic monitoring runs scripted sessions on a schedule'; 1073-1075: 'reuse representative scenarios developed during pre-release testing and help catch known failure modes early.'

claims.claim: deepgram: RUM 'aggregates signals from live traffic... captures variability introduced by user behavior, network conditions, and external dependencies that synthetic tests cannot fully simulate'
claims.found: 1076-1078: 'Real-user monitoring aggregates signals from live traffic. It captures variability introduced by user behavior, network conditions, and external dependencies that synthetic tests cannot fully simulate.'

claims.claim: 'Observability maintains conversational health during live operation' attributed to deepgram line 1075 (note prose labels this 'Together:')
claims.found: 1075-1076: 'Observability maintains conversational health during live operation.' Quote + line correct; note's prose label 'Together:' is a loose/wrong attribution label but the source citation itself is accurate (deepgram, not Together).

claims.claim: deepgram: observability 'does not replace evaluation... provides continuous input that guides where deeper analysis is required'
claims.found: 1063-1065: 'It does not replace evaluation or testing programs. Instead, it provides continuous input that guides where deeper analysis is required.'

claims.claim: together: S2S 'run a transcription model alongside the S2S model for auditability... evals shift to full-duplex whole-conversation metrics'
claims.found: 44: 'run a transcription model alongside the S2S model for auditability (see incoming/outgoing audio as text); evals shift to full-duplex whole-conversation metrics.'

summary: All code_refs and source figures verified against ground truth. Both LiveKit metrics/base.py code_refs (115 RealtimeModelMetrics, 143 ttft='time to first audio token', 143-157 token splits) are exact. All deepgram-ebook quotes (1069-1081, 1063-1065, 1075-1076) and the together-talk line 44 S2S shadow-transcription quote are verbatim. Only nit: note prose labels the deepgram line-1075 quote with 'Together:' but the source citation it gives is correctly deepgram-ebook, so no miscitation.
